title: Oil tanker CEO sees Hormuz ship traffic quickly increasing if U.S. and Iran reach a deal
summary_full: Many shipowners are just waiting for the threat assessment to be downgraded before crossing Hormuz, Frontline CEO Lars Barstad said.
summary_public: Many shipowners are just waiting for the threat assessment to be downgraded before crossing Hormuz, Frontline CEO Lars Barstad said.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: U.S. and Iran reach a deal
